subject: Gaming
title: Half-Life Rewrites the Shooter
description: A fast breakdown of Half-Life Rewrites the Shooter for builders.

hook.text: Half-Life had no cutscenes. The story happened around you while you kept playing. That was unheard of.

buildup.text: Valve's debut put you in the shoes of Gordon Freeman—a scientist in a facility overrun by aliens.

discovery.text: Every story moment played out in first-person. You never lost control. The camera never cut away.

twist.text: Valve delayed the game a full year to rebuild it from scratch. They bet everything on quality.

climax.text: Half-Life's immersive storytelling influenced every single-player shooter that followed.

punchline.text: No cutscenes, no camera tricks. Just you inside the story.

quiz.question: What made Half-Life's storytelling revolutionary?
options: All story moments happened in first-person with no cutscenes
It had the most dialogue of any game
